lexicalEntries.example: Nha mae bai loja kompra sabang.
lexicalEntries.exampleTranslation: My mother went to the shop to buy soap.

stories.title: At the shop
stories.summary: A phrase card built around everyday buying and greeting language.
stories.body: Nha mae bai loja kompra sabang.
stories.translation: My mother went to the shop to buy soap.
